responsibilities: Design and build recommendation models that personalize content, products, or media for individual users
Develop collaborative filtering and content-based algorithms to improve relevance of recommended items
Build real-time ranking systems that serve personalized recommendations at low latency and high scale
Engineer user and item embeddings that capture behavioral and contextual signals for personalization
Design and analyze A/B tests to measure the impact of recommendation algorithm changes on engagement
Address cold-start challenges for new users and items using hybrid and content-based recommendation strategies
Optimize feature pipelines that aggregate user interaction data for real-time and batch model training
Collaborate with product teams to define ranking objectives that balance relevance, diversity, and business goals
Monitor recommendation system performance, detecting and addressing model staleness or feedback loop bias
Scale recommendation infrastructure to handle millions of users and items with sub-second response times
